description: An Impressionist landscape depicting the village of Saint-Mammes along a river in winter. A cluster of white and cream-colored houses with brown roofs sits behind a low stone wall at the right side of the composition. Bare, leafless trees line the left bank of the river, their slender trunks and branches silhouetted against a pale, overcast winter sky. The river or canal extends along the left foreground, its surface reflecting the muted light. The ground is covered in dry winter vegetation in tones of brown and rust.
